description: Displaying clear per-person pricing for restaurant offerings, particularly during Ramadan, to build trust and facilitate purchasing decisions among Saudi diners.
structural_recipe: Post restaurant meal offerings with explicit per-person pricing in Saudi Riyals. Include restaurant name and location (e.g., street name). Use clear Arabic text stating 'الشخص ب [amount] ريال' format. Include high-quality food photography. Tag photographer or contributors. Time posts during peak dining consideration periods, especially Ramadan iftar.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value financial clarity and transparency in dining decisions. Displaying exact per-person pricing removes friction from purchase decisions, builds brand credibility, and aligns with cultural preference for straightforward business practices. During Ramadan, when dining out for iftar is a significant cultural activity, transparent pricing demonstrates respect for consumer intelligence and facilitates group dining planning.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing must be in Saudi Riyals to maintain relevance and trust
Ramadan timing significantly amplifies engagement; use pattern primarily during holy month
Ensure prices are current and accurate to avoid credibility damage
Per-person pricing format is culturally expected; deviation may reduce effectiveness
cultural_constraints: Pricing transparency is highly valued in Saudi F&B culture
Ramadan context increases pattern relevance and engagement potential
Location specificity (street names, landmarks) important for local market relevance
